response.justification: While Mr. Szabo possesses extensive software development experience across various domains and platforms, including some AI-agent infrastructure work, his resume lacks direct, explicit experience in hardware optimization for AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload performance analysis at the hardware level, which are core requirements for this Principal role. His strong general engineering background might allow him to adapt, but the specific domain expertise is not evident.
strengths: Over 30 years of extensive software development experience.
Demonstrated versatility across full-stack, embedded, and distributed systems.
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and general performance optimization.
concerns: Lack of direct experience with AI accelerator hardware optimization.
No explicit mention of SoC/IP modeling or system-on-chip design feedback.
Limited evidence of deep-learning workload analysis at the hardware level.
